Razor Fang of Xygoz  
 

Lore Item No Trade Placeable
Slot: PRIMARY SECONDARY
Skill: 1H Slashing Atk Delay: 23
DMG: 14 Dmg Bonus: 35
This item is placeable in yards, guild yards, houses and guild halls.
DEX: +10
Effect: Blessing of Nature (Combat, Casting Time: Instant) at Level 50
WT: 0.5 Size: MEDIUM
Class: WAR RNG SHD ROG
Race: ALL
Slot 1, Type 4 (Weapon: General)
Slot 2, Type 20 (Ornamentation)
Razor Fang of Xygoz

Skill: 1H Slashing Atk Delay: 23
DMG: 14 Dmg Bonus: 35
This item is placeable in yards, guild yards, houses and guild halls.

Item Type:1H Slashing
Stackable:No

Item Updated By:SwiftyMUSE
Source:Live
IC Last Updated:2022-01-14 01:16:07
Page Updated:Wed Jun 25th, 2014

Expansion: Ruins of Kunark
Rarity: Rare
Level to Attain: 55

Drops

This item is found on creatures.

Veeshan's Peak 1.0
NPC Name
Milyex Vioren
Xygoz

Veeshan's Peak 1.0

its alive!
QuoteReply
# Feb 19 2015 at 10:48 PM Rating: Good
Tobynn
Sage
770 posts
Still drops. Snagged one today from Milyex. Might come in handy when other clickies with similar effect are on 3 minute cooldown or outright resisted. No refresh timer on combat proc :)

#REDACTED, Posted: Mar 10 2002 at 11:00 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) so nert maybe you should catch up on dragon history if what you are saying is true which is is not and dragons did kill iksar and steal the stuff and made it no drop the they also stole there ability to be wizards and use Solist's Robe of Invocation right now stop flammin and dont post here

# Sep 13 2001 at 10:32 PM Rating: Default

View User Forum
Anonymous
Daakar, you fool, this isn't even an iksar weapon, its the fang of a dragon. Razor Fang of Xygoz would mean its his fang, moron, not an iksar made weapon unless they stole his teeth without him noticing and made weapons from it, and then returning the fang to him, which i consider about a 40% likelihood at best.

#REDACTED, Posted: Sep 05 2001 at 2:53 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) First of all it's Khu'kri. Second of all, catch up on your history. Dragons attacked iksar because we were getting more uber then them so they attacked us and took our uber stuff and made in no drop...
#REDACTED, Posted: Sep 05 2001 at 9:10 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) yer to much of an idiot to bother flaming, please dont post here anymore.
#Anonymous, Posted: Sep 05 2001 at 2:36 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) Try scrolling up to the top where it says Dropped in Veeshans Peak. dumbass!

# Sep 05 2001 at 12:21 AM Rating: Default

16 posts
It does drop in kunark =)
▲ Page top
Proc
QuoteReply
# Sep 04 2001 at 6:46 PM Rating: Good
__DEL__1592245584809
3 posts
the proc is a personal mark of karn spell, it gives you about 5hp everytime you hit the mob it lands on with your main hand.

Ive had it land on the Dain, the statue and sontalak, i havent used it on many other mobs, its been banked for quite awhile.

And it does not stack with mark of karn.

*edit*
Ive also experienced something weird while using this weapon, it happened 2 or 3 times in tov and only when i was using the fang, i was at full or near full hp and got a message that i was pierced by thorns and was killed instantly, not postive it was the weapon but it only happened when i was using it and the proc is a sort of damage shield.
▲ Page top
RE: Proc
QuoteReply
# Mar 02 2002 at 9:55 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591772015958
84 posts
Was a bug i think, for your edit part, happened to me once randomly...you are struck by pain...i died instantly

Effect
QuoteReply
# Sep 04 2001 at 6:08 PM Rating: Decent
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
According to the spdat.eff file...

Blessing of Nature
Damage Shield by 1 (L1)


--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Classes: None

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Skill: Abjuration
Allowable Targets: All

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Range to Target: 200 feet

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Resistance Check: Magic

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Spell Duration: 20 ticks (2.0 minutes)
Duration Formula: 8

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Spell cast on you: Your body is surrounded by an aura of nature.
Spell cast on someone: Soandso is surrounded by an aura of nature.
Spell fades: The aura fades.


Doesn't say anything about stacking nor proc vs. RC. May not even be accurate given all the garbage Verant put in that file. Effect or not, still an excellent weapon.
